description.zh: 托马斯·科弗和彼得·哈特形式化了最近邻模式分类，说明已标注样本如何通过局部距离支持非参数分类。这个结果使基于实例的学习成为模式识别和机器学习中的长期基线。
description.en: Thomas Cover and Peter Hart formalized nearest-neighbor pattern classification, showing how labeled examples could support nonparametric classification by local proximity. The result made instance-based learning a durable baseline for pattern recognition and machine learning.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
